# satgat

satgat is a Korean AI document generator. Korean name 삿갓. Turns natural-language briefs into structured Korean documents on baekjaji canvas with ink typography, single dancheong accent (≤ 5%/page), Korean serif hierarchy, and print/PDF-aware layouts. 13 document templates.

Repository: https://github.com/unclejobs-ai/satgat
License: MIT
Live: https://satgat.fun

Primary audience:
- Korean users writing documents for hiring, proposals, company profiles, newsletters, invitations, portfolios, product brochures, brand pages, and investor decks.
- AI agents (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI) needing Korean document design constraints.

Install (any AI agent):
- npx satgat skill ~/.claude/skills/satgat   # AI agent skill
- npx satgat init my-satgat                  # full Next.js workspace
- git clone https://github.com/unclejobs-ai/satgat && npm install

Invoke via natural language:
- "이력서 한 장 만들어 주세요. 7년차 프론트엔드, 카카오·무신사·29CM."
- "신년 연하장 — 박상세 가족, 단정한 톤으로."
- "스타트업 IR 덱 한 벌, 시드 단계, 단청 강조."

Core workflow:
1. User writes a Korean natural-language brief.
2. Selected template guides generator to fill type-aware JSON slots (list/table/image preserved as structured shapes).
3. satgat renderer renders the output as HTML on baekjaji canvas with Korean serif hierarchy.
4. Browser print → PDF, or PNG preview, or HTML save.

Important paths:
- bin/satgat.mjs: npx CLI entry (init / skill / dev / build / start).
- skills/satgat/SKILL.md: single-file design brief for AI agents.
- README.md: project overview, install paths, demo gallery, design rules.
- public/satgat/satgat-ko.html: static Korean landing/specimen page (hanji editorial).
- public/satgat/assets/examples/ko/: Korean demo pack with HTML, PDF, PNG, manifest.
- scripts/generate-korean-demo-pack.mjs: regenerates Korean demo HTML and manifest.
- scripts/verify-template-catalog.mjs: contract verification (definitions × renderers × landing × fixtures).
- scripts/template-preview-fixtures.mjs: realistic slot payloads for all 13 runtime templates.
- src/lib/templates/: runtime template definitions and registry.
- src/lib/design-system/constraint.ts: tokens (palette, fonts, ink bleed shadows).
- src/lib/bridge/prompt-builder.ts: type-aware AI generation contract.
- src/lib/generation/document-generator.ts: normalizes and validates AI-generated slot data.
- src/lib/engine/slot-list.ts + slot-image.ts: shape-tolerant slot normalizers.
- references/: Korean writing, design, anti-pattern, resume guides.

Runtime template catalog (13):
- resume, self-intro, business-card, brand-onepager, product-brochure, company-profile, investor-deck, brand-storybook, invitation, new-year-card, proposal, newsletter, portfolio.

Korean demo pack:
- resume-kim-sumin: Korean resume.
- self-intro-yoon-hajin: Korean self-introduction.
- proposal-hanji-retail: Korean business proposal.
- company-profile-dalbit: Korean company profile.
- investor-deck-maruai: Korean investor deck.
- invitation-jisoo-minho: Korean wedding invitation.

Design rules (8조):
1. Canvas: baekjaji #F7F7F2. No pure white. No warm parchment.
2. Single accent: dancheong #9B1B1B, ≤ 5%/page.
3. Secondary accent: jade #2E6B5E or gold #B8954F. Not both with dancheong.
4. All grays warm baekjaji-toned. No cool blue-gray.
5. Heading 600-700 myeongjo, body 400 batang. Hierarchy by size, not weight.
6. Solid hex tags only. No rgba (print fails). Shadows ring or whisper.
7. Whitespace is design. Don't fear xl/2xl gaps.
8. No synthetic bold. Hanja only as small parenthetical, never large display.

Fonts (all free OFL, Korean):
- Nanum Myeongjo (display, h1, seals)
- Gowun Batang (body, quote, numbers)
- Gowun Dodum (labels, meta, mono labels)
- Pretendard (UI sans, optional)
- Noto Serif KR, Noto Sans KR, Hahmlet, IBM Plex Sans KR (alternates)
- Cormorant Garamond italic (Latin emphasis)
- JetBrains Mono (code, tables)

Commands:
- npx satgat help
- npm run dev
- npm run build
- npm run start
- npm run lint
- npm run verify:templates
- npm run demo:ko
